Based on the provided context, **Rachel Maddow** is the commentator and author who questioned the validity of the Center for Organizational Research and Education's (CORE) non-profit status.

The text explicitly states that Rachel Maddow is an "American television host, political commentator, and author" and notes that "commentators from Rachel Maddow to Michael Pollan have treated the group [CORE] as an entity that specializes in astroturfing," following the mention that experts have questioned the group's non-profit status.
